title: erodium malacoides subsp. floribundum
intro: Erodium malacoides subsp. floribundum, also known as the floriferous or herbaceous stork's bill, is a plant species belonging to the geranium family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Erodium malacoides subsp. floribundum include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, which is commonly used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
